name: AFO Mobile Visual Runtime
description: Mobile-first visual runtime MCP/app for generating constrained Three.js frontends that bind cleanly to Cloudflare backends.

tools.name: create_mobile_scene_spec
tools.description: Create a constrained mobile-first visual scene spec.

tools.name: compile_three_mobile_page
tools.description: Compile a scene spec into Worker-safe HTML using Three.js from CDN.

tools.name: optimize_for_phone
tools.description: Apply mobile rendering constraints like pixel ratio cap, low-power mode, and texture budget.

tools.name: bind_d1_rows_to_objects
tools.description: Map backend rows into 3D visual objects.

tools.name: bind_r2_images_to_textures
tools.description: Map R2 image URLs into lazy-loaded Three.js textures.

tools.name: generate_visual_receipt
tools.description: Return a deploy/test receipt for a generated mobile visual app.
